title: Interview operators and baseline workflow
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 interviews and baseline minutes/error categories recorded

title: Select pilot teams and sign data terms
Inventory pilot formats regions currencies languages
Freeze required fields and unacceptable errors
acceptance_criteria: Pilot field profile and blocking errors signed off

title: Approve hosting processor and retention plan
Implement decimal and currency precision registry
Implement generic identifiers taxes and classifications
Implement JSON CSV XLSX exports
acceptance_criteria: Exports reconcile and formula injection safe

title: Define canonical schema and profile migration policy
acceptance_criteria: Version compatibility and migration fixtures pass

title: Format detector and quarantine route
acceptance_criteria: Known formats route; unknown structured quarantines

title: Implement provider-neutral extraction adapter contract with strict schema output
acceptance_criteria: Contract tests and cost metadata pass

title: Extraction provenance and idempotency
acceptance_criteria: Repeat attempt does not duplicate approved state

title: Single targeted repair path
acceptance_criteria: Only allowed fields patched; one attempt max

title: Initial UBL/CII detection adapter
acceptance_criteria: Synthetic structured fixtures map or quarantine

title: Freeze M2 provider contract and feature flags
acceptance_criteria: Existing contract tests pass; provider disable restores prior behavior

title: Digital PDF parser adapter
acceptance_criteria: Digital PDF fixtures produce reproducible page structure and provenance

title: Scan layout OCR evidence adapter
acceptance_criteria: Image/TIFF fixtures return OCR layout evidence or safe quality failure

title: Qwen canonical semantic extraction adapter
acceptance_criteria: Supported fixtures return schema-valid candidates or explicit failure

title: Compose local routes with provenance and idempotency
acceptance_criteria: Replays are idempotent and every route/version is reproducible

title: Benchmark synthetic and real corpora
acceptance_criteria: 29 fixtures run; 25 ground truths scored; real holdout separate

title: Bounded repair and safe model failure handling
acceptance_criteria: One field-scoped repair max; timeout/OOM/invalid output fail safely

title: Select model configuration and approve rollout ADR
acceptance_criteria: Selected route documented; feature-flag rollback tested; M3 contract unchanged

title: Document workflow and Solid Queue jobs
Batch progress and risk queue
acceptance_criteria: Progress updates and risk sorting work

title: Deploy web job database and backups
Security CI and upload abuse suite
Measure safety speed and cost gates
Operator debrief and willingness to pay
Choose one post-MVP regional or structured capability
acceptance_criteria: Pilot evidence selects one capability and rejects parallel expansion

title: Acquire official schemas validators and permitted fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Exact versions and redistributable regression fixtures recorded

title: Implement versioned adapter or regional rule pack
acceptance_criteria: Feature-flagged implementation maps to Canonical Invoice v2 without core schema pollution

title: Build independent holdout and conformance regression
acceptance_criteria: Named profile passes its independent extraction semantic or conformance gate

title: Publish capability statement rollout and rollback plan
acceptance_criteria: Capability matrix updated and pilot release can be disabled without affecting global core
